sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n33934" key="e)m" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐμ</orth>, <sense id="n33934.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἐν</ref></xr>, before labials.</sense> </entryFree>
